description_long: This is a cylindrical red can with a metallic top and bottom, resembling a typical soft drink or snack beverage container. The can features a series of white circular bubbles on one side, giving it a playful and effervescent appearance. On the main face, the word 'Blender' is prominently displayed in large white letters, accompanied by a vertical '3D' text, both set against the red background. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving the can a polished look. The top of the can is silver, likely made of aluminum, with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. There are no visible nutritional labels, flavor indications, or promotional graphics aside from the branding.
description: A glossy red cylindrical can with metallic top and bottom, decorated with white bubbles and 'Blender' branding.
description_view_0: The can is mostly red with a few white bubbles visible on the side, and the metallic top is clearly seen.
description_view_1: This view shows the front with the 'Blender' logo and vertical '3D' text, along with several white bubbles.
description_view_2: The can appears mostly red with only a small part of the '3D' text visible near the edge.
description_view_3: The can is entirely red from this angle, with no visible text or graphics, and the metallic top is visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The word 'Blender' in large white letters vertically on the front, with '3D' in smaller text; no other logo present.
